Build Your Soul File. 🧬 Go Private. Go Personal. It Learns Your Voice. WindyTune: It Adapts So You Don't Have To. 🌪️ Airplane Mode? No Problem. ✈️ One Download. A Partner for Life. 15 Models. One Mission. Your Words, Perfectly.

🌪️ The Green Strobe Never Lies.

If it's green, your words are being captured. No anxiety. No guessing. No "was it recording?" Just talk — for as long as you want. No time limits. Ever.

"By the words of your mouth, worlds are created."

Your voice is the most powerful creation tool you own. Windy Pro makes sure every word counts.

🐧 Yes, we support Linux. Windows, macOS, AND Linux. Every major operating system. No one gets left out.

🌪️ 15 Models. One Mission.
Your Words, Perfectly.

Our engineers developed, fine-tuned, and certified every model in our laboratory. We benchmark obsessively. We regression-test relentlessly. And we never stop improving them.

No other voice-to-text platform in history has ever shipped 15 proprietary models spanning mobile to desktop. Nobody has come close.

⚡

Windy Core

GPU-Accelerated Power

Seven models for desktops and workstations with dedicated GPUs. When you have the hardware, unleash the full experience. Maximum speed. Maximum accuracy.

Fastest

Windy Core Spark

149 MB

Lightning-fast English transcription. Ultra-low latency for quick dictation.

🇺🇸 English ⚡ 32x speed

Windy Core Pulse

282 MB

Quick, reliable English with better accuracy than Spark. Great everyday model.

🇺🇸 English ⚡ 16x speed
Most Popular

Windy Core Standard

927 MB

The everyday workhorse. Strong accuracy across 99 languages. The one most people love.

🌍 99 Languages ⚡ 6x speed

Windy Core Global

2.9 GB

Multilingual powerhouse. Excels at non-English languages and code-switching between languages mid-sentence.

🌍 99 Languages ⚡ 2x speed
Flagship

Windy Core Ultra

2.9 GB

Maximum accuracy. The best we have. For professionals who accept nothing less than perfection.

🌍 99 Languages 🎯 Highest Accuracy

Windy Core Turbo

1.6 GB

Flagship speed with near-flagship accuracy. For when every millisecond matters.

🌍 99 Languages ⚡ Fast + Accurate
Sweet Spot

Windy Core Pro

1.5 GB

The sweet spot. Fast, accurate, efficient. Our engineers' personal favorite for English power users.

🌍 99 Languages ⚡ 6x speed
🛡️

Windy Edge

Runs Anywhere. No GPU Required.

Five models optimized for laptops, phones, tablets, and older hardware. Fully local, fully private, fully offline. This is the MoboLoco lineup.

Tiniest

Windy Edge Spark

42 MB

The smallest model in existence. Runs on literally anything. Your phone, your old laptop, your tablet.

🇺🇸 English 📱 42 MB!

Windy Edge Pulse

78 MB

Better quality, still tiny. Fits in your phone's pocket with room to spare.

🇺🇸 English 📱 78 MB
Best for Mobile

Windy Edge Standard

168 MB

Multilingual on your phone. 99 languages in 168 megabytes. Perfect for travelers.

🌍 99 Languages 📱 168 MB

Windy Edge Global

515 MB

Serious multilingual quality without a GPU. For laptops and tablets that need accuracy.

🌍 99 Languages 💻 515 MB
Edge Flagship

Windy Edge Ultra

1.1 GB

Desktop-class accuracy on CPU. The most powerful model that runs without a GPU.

🌍 99 Languages 💻 1.1 GB
🌍

Windy Lingua

Dedicated Language Excellence

Purpose-built models optimized for specific languages. When you need the absolute best for your language — not a generalist, a specialist. More languages coming.

Windy Lingua Español

927 MB

Built for Spanish. Optimized for Latin American and Castilian dialects. 🇪🇸🇲🇽🇦🇷🇨🇴

🇪🇸 Spanish 🎯 Specialist

Windy Lingua Français

927 MB

Built for French. Metropolitan, Canadian, and African French dialects. 🇫🇷🇨🇦🇧🇪🇨🇭

🇫🇷 French 🎯 Specialist

Windy Lingua हिन्दी

927 MB

Built for Hindi. Optimized for Devanagari script and Hindi-English code-switching. 🇮🇳

🇮🇳 Hindi 🎯 Specialist

99 Languages. One App. Zero Internet.

Our multilingual models understand 99 languages — all processed locally on your device.

🇿🇦 Afrikaans🇦🇱 Albanian🇪🇹 Amharic🇸🇦 Arabic🇦🇲 Armenian🇮🇳 Assamese🇦🇿 Azerbaijani🏳️ Bashkir🇪🇸 Basque🇧🇾 Belarusian🇧🇩 Bengali🇧🇦 Bosnian🇫🇷 Breton🇧🇬 Bulgarian🇲🇲 Burmese🇭🇰 Cantonese🇪🇸 Catalan🇨🇳 Chinese🇭🇷 Croatian🇨🇿 Czech🇩🇰 Danish🇳🇱 Dutch🇺🇸 English🇪🇪 Estonian🇫🇴 Faroese🇫🇮 Finnish🇫🇷 French🇪🇸 Galician🇬🇪 Georgian🇩🇪 German🇬🇷 Greek🇮🇳 Gujarati🇭🇹 Haitian Creole🇳🇬 Hausa🇺🇸 Hawaiian🇮🇱 Hebrew🇮🇳 Hindi🇭🇺 Hungarian🇮🇸 Icelandic🇮🇩 Indonesian🇮🇹 Italian🇯🇵 Japanese🇮🇩 Javanese🇮🇳 Kannada🇰🇿 Kazakh🇰🇭 Khmer🇰🇷 Korean🇱🇦 Lao🏛️ Latin🇱🇻 Latvian🇨🇩 Lingala🇱🇹 Lithuanian🇱🇺 Luxembourgish🇲🇰 Macedonian🇲🇬 Malagasy🇲🇾 Malay🇮🇳 Malayalam🇲🇹 Maltese🇳🇿 Māori🇮🇳 Marathi🇲🇳 Mongolian🇳🇵 Nepali🇳🇴 Norwegian🇳🇴 Nynorsk🇫🇷 Occitan🇦🇫 Pashto🇮🇷 Persian🇵🇱 Polish🇧🇷 Portuguese🇮🇳 Punjabi🇷🇴 Romanian🇷🇺 Russian🇮🇳 Sanskrit🇷🇸 Serbian🇿🇼 Shona🇵🇰 Sindhi🇱🇰 Sinhala🇸🇰 Slovak🇸🇮 Slovenian🇸🇴 Somali🇪🇸 Spanish🇮🇩 Sundanese🇰🇪 Swahili🇸🇪 Swedish🇵🇭 Tagalog🇹🇯 Tajik🇮🇳 Tamil🇷🇺 Tatar🇮🇳 Telugu🇹🇭 Thai🇨🇳 Tibetan🇹🇷 Turkish🇹🇲 Turkmen🇺🇦 Ukrainian🇵🇰 Urdu🇺🇿 Uzbek🇻🇳 Vietnamese🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 Welsh🕎 Yiddish🇳🇬 Yoruba

Our engineers are continually refining every model with the latest techniques. When we improve a model, you get the update automatically.

🌪️ WindyTune
It Adapts So You Don't Have To.

15 models is a lot. That's the point — we have one for every scenario. But you'll never have to choose.

☕

Coffee Shop

On your laptop, WindyTune selects a model perfectly optimized for your specific CPU and RAM. Efficient. Silent. Private.

→ Windy Edge Standard
→
🚗

On the Road

Phone call in the car. Your phone picks up seamlessly with a mobile-optimized model. No interruption. No setup.

→ Windy Edge Pulse
→
🖥️

The Office

Desktop with a powerful GPU. WindyTune upgrades you to the flagship experience. No expense spared. Maximum everything.

→ Windy Core Ultra

🔍 Continuous Monitoring

WindyTune measures your hardware, connection quality, speaking patterns, and environment — then automatically selects the optimal model in real-time. Every 30 seconds.

🔄 Seamless Switching

Laptop overheating? WindyTune drops to a lighter model. Plugged into power? It upgrades. GPU freed up? Full flagship mode. You never notice. You just keep talking.

🎛️ Power Users Welcome

Love manual control? Lock any model from the system tray. WindyTune shows you exactly WHY it chose what it chose. Override anytime. Your call.

No other voice-to-text platform in history has ever attempted anything like this.

🌪️ One Account. Any Device.
Perfectly Tuned For Each.

You don't download all 15 models. You don't need to. WindyTune scans your hardware and recommends the perfect selection for THAT specific device.

📱

Any Phone

iPhone or Android 4-8 GB RAM

★ Windy Edge Spark 42 MB
★ Windy Edge Pulse 78 MB

The full flagship experience
[Install Recommended]

Every device gets a great experience. Whether you're on a budget phone or a high-end workstation, WindyTune finds the perfect models for YOUR hardware. No device left behind.

Buy once, install on all your devices. No per-device fees. Add or remove models anytime. Most people tap "Install Recommended" and never think about it again.

🐕
🐕📱🕶️

"WindyPro make me go
mobo loco!"

Voice-to-text that NEVER leaves your phone. No internet required. Airplane mode, zero signal, middle of nowhere — doesn't matter. Your words. Your phone. Nobody else's business.

✈️

Airplane Mode? No Internet, No Problem.

Flying at 35,000 feet with no Wi-Fi? No internet, no problem. Windy Pro works perfectly. Dictate notes, transcribe thoughts, capture ideas. Fully offline. Always.

🏔️

Zero Bars? No Internet, No Problem.

Hiking in the mountains. Driving through rural country. Camping off-grid. No internet, no problem. Your transcription doesn't need a cell tower. Ever.

🔒

Private. Truly Private.

Every competitor sends your words to the cloud. They "assure" you it's private. We all know what they really do with your data. Windy Pro? Your words stay on YOUR phone. Period.

📱

42 MB. That's It.

Our smallest model is 42 megabytes. That's smaller than most selfies. Install it and forget it. It's always there when you need it.

Go MoboLoco! Stay Local. Stay Private. 🐕

🌍 Windy Translate
The World Speaks Your Language.

You don't need to learn 99 languages. You just need Windy Pro on your phone. Offline. Local. No internet required — no internet, no problem.

✨ Premium Feature — Available on Pro Max or as an add-on ($7.99/mo)
🗼

Paris. Evening. A café terrace with string lights.

He's American. She's French. He doesn't speak a word of French.

He holds up his phone. Speaks: "I just moved here. I don't know anyone. But this is the most beautiful city I've ever seen."

The phone shows her: "Je viens d'emménager ici. Je ne connais personne. Mais c'est la plus belle ville que j'aie jamais vue."

She smiles. Speaks French into the phone.

His screen: "Then let me show you the parts the tourists never see."

They both blush. He puts the phone away. They walk off together.

1

Hold up your phone

2

They speak their language

3

You read yours

4

You speak yours

5

They read theirs

No internet. No cloud. No third-party server processing your conversation.
Just two people connecting — in any language.

No Internet, No Problem. In 99 Languages.

🌪️ Stay Local.
Stay Private.

This is the one that matters most.

🚫 Other Platforms

  • Every word uploaded to their cloud
  • Processed on servers you don't control
  • Stored in databases you can't audit
  • They "promise" it's private
  • Data about your data — mined, analyzed, monetized
  • No internet = no transcription
  • Monthly subscription forever

✅ Windy Pro

  • Your words NEVER leave your device
  • Processed locally, on YOUR hardware
  • Nothing to audit — it's all on your machine
  • We don't promise privacy. We engineered it.
  • Zero telemetry. Zero data collection. Zero.
  • No internet? No problem.
  • Pay once. Use forever.

Even Our Cloud Mode Is Private

Sometimes you want the extra horsepower of our GPU servers. Even then:

🔐 End-to-end encrypted
🗑️ Audio deleted immediately after processing
🚫 Never used for training. Never sold. Never mined.
✅ Open-source client encryption — audit it yourself

Even when you choose the cloud — your privacy doesn't change. Only the processing location does.

☁️ Auto-Sync
Like iCloud Photos, But For Your Voice.

Record all day on your phone. When you get back to Wi-Fi, everything syncs automatically.

🎙️

Record All Day

Meetings, notes, ideas — everything stays on your phone while you're out.

📶
📡

Hit Wi-Fi

Walk into your home, office, or coffee shop. Windy Pro detects the connection.

→
☁️

Auto-Sync

Transcripts, audio, video — silently uploaded to your personal vault. Phone storage freed up.

🌪️ WindyPro Cloud — Power to the People

Your privacy is paramount!

At WindyPro, we never use your data — or data about your data — for anything. Period. End of story. Your files, your recordings, your Soul File — they belong to YOU. We don't mine it. We don't analyze it. We don't sell it. We don't even look at it.

Switch to WindyPro Cloud for all your storage needs. Cancel Dropbox. Cancel Google storage. Cancel iCloud. Store everything — not just your voice files, but all your documents, photos, and files — in a vault built by people who actually respect your privacy.

🌪️

"In the beginning was the Word."

Every sacred text across every culture tells the same story: creation begins with the spoken word. Your voice isn't just sound — it's the most ancient and powerful tool of creation.

When you speak into Windy Pro, you're not just dictating text. You're painting visions. Architecting ideas. Breathing worlds into existence — the same way it's always been done.

Speak, and let there be. 🌪️

🧬 Build Your Soul File.
Talk Today. Live Forever.

Here's what nobody else is offering — and what you'll thank yourself for starting today.

🎙️ Voice Clone Data

Every time you use Windy Pro, you're building a dataset of your voice — pitch, timbre, rhythm, accent, emotional range. After enough hours, you have everything needed for a perfect voice clone that speaks exactly like you.

📹 Avatar Data

Turn on video archiving and your laptop camera or phone captures your face, expressions, and mannerisms. Over time, this becomes the foundation for a digital avatar twin that looks and moves like you.

🧠 Your Personality

Your vocabulary, sentence patterns, topics you care about, how you explain things — all captured naturally. This is the data that makes a digital twin feel real.

Your Journey

5 hours
Basic voice profile
20 hours
Good voice clone quality
50 hours
Excellent — studio-grade clone ready
200 hours
Full digital twin: voice + avatar + personality
♾️
Your legacy. Preserved forever.

Imagine: a thousand years from now, your descendants put on a headset and have a conversation with you. Not a recording — a responsive, interactive version of you that speaks with your voice, uses your vocabulary, and structures sentences the way you do.

Built from data you gathered effortlessly, just by talking into Windy Pro during your normal day.

Some people download Windy Pro for the transcription. Some download it because they saw their friend's perfect voice clone and thought: "I need to start archiving NOW." Both are right.

Your Voice, Your Way.
Choose Your Plan.

Start free. Go monthly. Or pay once and own it forever. Your call.
